chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.70 of 2022 Muhammad Farhan Siddiqui Versus Fahad Nasir Khan DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.2565/2022 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 18.01.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Except first date when appellant’s counsel appeared in this appeal, he was called absent on all the following dates that is 27.10.2022, 09.12.2022, 16.08.2023, 25.09.2023 and so also today and there is no intimation either. It is 12:15 p.m. The instant First Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
